subject: You're VIP. Here's what that means
preheader: Your $5 is refundable. Your 24-hour head start is not negotiable.
body:
Hi {first_name},

You're in. Your VIP spot is locked.

Here's exactly what that gets you.

When the equity raise opens on Birchal on 23 June 2026, VIPs get the offer link in their inbox 24 hours before the public list. That's a mechanical head start, not a vague promise. You see the offer, read the document, and decide while the public list is still waiting.

Minimum investment is $50. Maximum is $10,000 per investor. Full details land in the disclosure document on Birchal when the round opens.

If you change your mind between now and then, your $5 is fully refundable. Email us and we send it back.

Between now and launch I'll send two more notes. One is a behind-the-scenes piece I wouldn't write publicly. One walks through how the offer actually works, so you're not making the call cold on launch day.

If you have a question right now, hit reply. I read every one.

This is not financial advice. Consider seeking independent financial advice. Full details in the disclosure document on Birchal.

Rachel and the FarmThru team
creative_brief: Plain-text feel. Warm confirmation tone. No hero image. Optional small 'VIP' badge or mark near the masthead. Single soft CTA at the bottom (reply-to, not a button).
